intended_use: The device is a diagnostic imaging system that combines Positron Emission Tomography (PET) and X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) systems. The CT component produces cross-sectional images of the body by c
intended_use_full: The device is a diagnostic imaging system that combines Positron Emission Tomography (PET) and X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) systems. The CT component produces cross-sectional images of the body by computer reconstruction of X-ray transmission data. The PET component images the distribution of PET radiopharmaceuticals in the patient body. The device is to be used by a trained health care professional to gather metabolic and functional information from the distribution of the radiopharmaceutical in the body for the assessment of metabolic and physiologic functions. This information can assist in the evaluation, detection, localization, diagnosis, staging, restaging, follow-up, therapeutic planning and therapeutic outcome assessment of oncological, cardiovascular, neurological diseases and disorders. Additionally, this device can be operated independently as a whole body multi-slice CT scanner.
target_condition: Oncological, cardiovascular, and neurological diseases and disorders; lesions affected by respiratory motion in thorax, abdomen, and pelvis
ground_truth: Expert visual assessment by three physicians with at least 20 years of nuclear medicine experience; quantitative comparison of SUV parameters and tumor volume
other_metrics: SUV (Standardized Uptake Value) max and mean accuracy; tumor volume measurements compared between Deviceless PET Respiratory-gating, non-gated, and device-based gating methods. All three physicians determined that Deviceless images were of diagnostic quality and had better or same performance as non-gated or device-based gated images.

recalls.reason: When PET-CT system is executing reconstruction, if PET acquisition for another patient is performed (or PET reconstruction for another patient is performed from raw data processing), PET reconstruction control processing may hang up and PET reconstruction may stop as a result, which may necessitate repeat PET/CT examinations.
recalls.product_description: Cartesion Prime, Digital PET-CT, Model: PCD-1000A/3D.004, PCD-1000A/3D, is a diagnostic imaging system that combines Positron Emission Tomography (PET) and X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) systems.
